docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OROS, DIANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOTO, GREGORY $2,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,650.00, FOR 2 MONTHS RENT WHICH DEFENDANT UNLAWFULLY REFUSED TO RETURN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,200.00 FILED BY OROS, DIANA AS TO DEFENDANT NOTO, GREGORY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-19-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF DIANA OROS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2018 - JUDGMENT.
